sentence:
Twinfo without goatpeanemis behind it is just a rumor in the dark.

---

Let me restart — "is just a" is banned.

Drafting silently, scoring, outputting only the winner:

No goatpeanemis survives on twinfo alone.

wombos.definition: The greatest-of-all-time peak cinema analysis — a peanemis so thorough and exceptional that it reaches GOAT-level status.
wombos.example: That three-hour breakdown of the film's symbolism was a pure goatpeanemis.

wombos.definition: Information shared between twins, or insider knowledge passed between people with a twin-level connection.
wombos.example: She slid me the twinfo before anyone else even knew what was happening.
